# Guy — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> An educational English grammar quiz platform targeting Hebrew-speaking learners. The content focuses on teaching verb tenses — Present Simple, Past Simple, Present Continuous, and Future Simple — through structured multiple-choice questions with contextual hints written in Hebrew. The platform has a clear pedagogical approach, guiding students to identify time-marker clues (e.g., 'last night', 'right now', 'next week') to choose the correct verb form.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://guy-a8274abf.zappy5.app
Unlock English grammar mastery for Hebrew speakers! Practice verb tenses with smart quizzes, contextual hints, and department of education-aligned lessons. Start now!

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://guy-a8274abf.zappy5.app
- Endpoint: https://guy-a8274abf.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Guy
An educational English grammar quiz platform targeting Hebrew-speaking learners. The content focuses on teaching verb tenses — Present Simple, Past Simple, Present Continuous, and Future Simple — through structured multiple-choice questions with contextual hints written in Hebrew. The platform has a clear pedagogical approach, guiding students to identify time-marker clues (e.g., 'last night', 'right now', 'next week') to choose the correct verb form.

## Target Audience
- English language learners (likely Hebrew speakers based on hint language)
- Hebrew English Learners
- ESL Students in Universities
- Expat English Learners

## Industry
education

---

- Robots: https://guy-a8274abf.zappy5.app/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://guy-a8274abf.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
